# minSegmentAlignment

**Instance Property**

The minimum alignment of the data buffer sent to read-write calls.

## Declaration

```swift
uint32_t minSegmentAlignment;
```

## Discussion

This minimum affects the `dmaAddr` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.blockstoragedevicedriverkit/documentation/BlockStorageDeviceDriverKit/IOUserBlockStorageDevice/DoAsyncReadWrite] function.

## Accessing Device Parameters

- **numOfBlocks**: The number of blocks on the device.
- **blockSize**: The size of a block on the device.
- **maxIOSize**: The maximum amount of data per I/O call.
- **numOfOutstandingIOs**: The upper limit to the number of requests sent to the device.
- **maxNumOfUnmapRegions**: The maximum number of regions supported by an unmap call.
- **numOfAddressBits**: The number of bits used to address blocks on the device.
- **isUnmapSupported**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the device supports unmapping to reclaim storage.
- **isFUASupported**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the device supports forced unit access (FUA).
